productDisplayName: Puma Women Maya Shimmer Black Sports Shoes
description: puma has its roots in Germany, and the brand is known for its minimalistic design in high-end athletic footwear. Crafted in the brand's signature style, these puma Maya Shimmer shoes for women are the right solution for brand conscious comfort junkies. The shoes are great for regular wear as they ensure superior traction and protection to the feet, without compromising on comfort and style.UpperVelvety fabric perforated upper with synthetic overlaysForm stripe at the side that acts as a overlayCentral lace upsPadded tongueFabric liningReinforced overlay at the heelMidsoleShock-absorbing midsole for added comfortOutsoleTextured rubber outsole with circular nubs at the forefoot regionshoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
